config.splits_note: AF redistributed across train/val/test (train: 202,203; val: 201,219,222,213; test: 210,221,200)
known_issues: MITBIHSegmentDataset did not pass window_seconds through to segment_record (fixed post-run, commit follows); v1 windows were effectively 30s truncated to 10s, not native 10s segments. Total segment count was unchanged at 2880.

training.training_curve_note: train F1 flat at ~0.31, val F1 flat at ~0.24 across all epochs — model never moved off mode-collapse to majority class.

verdict: Complete mode collapse to NSR. Removing class weighting let the model bet on the train majority class for every input. Predictive entropy ranking was uninformative (AURC 0.86) — selective prediction cannot rescue an undertrained model.
